title: rosa × bifera
intro: Rosa × bifera, also known as the wild rose or European wild rose, is a hybrid plant species that is a cross between Rosa gallica and Rosa acicularis. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa × bifera include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, as well as its potential to protect against certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Rosa × bifera can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
